name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, oil, and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, vanilla, and sour milk to the mixture. Beat well.
3. Sift dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, cocoa, cinnamon) into a separate bowl.
4. Mix the sifted dry ingredients into the wet mixture until just combined.
5. Stir in grated zucchini until evenly distributed.
6. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 inch pan and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until done.
8. Let cool slightly before frosting.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
1. Cream together softened cream cheese, butter until smooth.
2. Beat in vanilla and a pinch of salt.
3. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating well to reach desired consistency.
4. Frost the cooled cake once set.
